title: Falcon Handoff Log
description: Session-state log: .claude/handoff.yaml. Each entry covers one session/branch and captures completed/discovered/in-progress/blockers/next_steps. Companion doc: .claude/docs/handoff-schema.md.

template_entry.description: Optional documentation entry that travels with the schema. Recommended.

entries.description: Newest-first list of session handoff entries.

date.description: Wall-clock session-end time, UTC, to the minute. Format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC' OR 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ'.

branch.description: Feature branch the session worked on.

focus.description: Category tags for the session's work.

completed.description: Beads closed this session. Each entry: '<bead-id>: <outcome>'.

in_progress.description: Beads claimed but not closed; partial-work state.

blockers.description: Beads stuck on external dependencies, decisions, or merges.

epic_progress.description: One-line delta per active epic, e.g., 'asteroid-001 35% → 48%'.

commits.description: 7-char commit hashes from the session, in order. Always quoted in YAML to prevent number-parsing.

notes.description: Optional free-form addenda for context that doesn't fit structured fields.
